mapper.select:
SELECT o.*, c.cust_name, e1.emp_name as drafter_name, e2.emp_name as appr_name, s.code_contents as status_name FROM orders o JOIN CUST_TABLE c ON o.cust_code = c.cust_code JOIN emp e1 ON o.drafter_empno = e1.emp_no LEFT JOIN emp e2 ON o.appr_empno = e2.emp_no LEFT JOIN status_type s ON s.bcode = 600 AND o.eapp_status = s.mcode
AND o.order_drafting_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND o.order_drafting_date <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND o.cust_code = #{custCodeParam}
AND o.eapp_status IN
#{status}
AND ( UPPER(c.cust_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(e1.emp_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(e2.emp_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM orders_detail od JOIN PRODUCT p ON od.product_code = p.product_code WHERE od.order_code = o.order_code AND UPPER(p.product_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' ) )
ORDER BY o.order_drafting_date DESC, o.order_code DESC

SELECT o.*, c.cust_name, e1.emp_name as drafter_name, e2.emp_name as appr_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN CUST_TABLE c ON o.cust_code = c.cust_code LEFT JOIN emp e1 ON o.drafter_empno = e1.emp_no LEFT JOIN emp e2 ON o.appr_empno = e2.emp_no WHERE o.order_code = #{orderCode}
SELECT od.*, p.product_name FROM orders_detail od JOIN PRODUCT p ON od.product_code = p.product_code WHERE od.order_code = #{orderCode}

SELECT QTY FROM ( SELECT cm.QTY FROM CLOSING_MONTH cm WHERE cm.PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode} AND cm.CLOSING_TYPE = 1 AND cm.QTY IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cm.REG_DATE DESC, cm.CLOSING_YM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT cust_code, cust_name FROM CUST_TABLE WHERE CUST_DEL_STATUS = 1 AND cust_type = 2 ORDER BY cust_name ASC
SELECT product_code, product_name, product_price FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_DEL_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY product_name ASC
SELECT d.dept_mgr FROM emp e JOIN dept d ON e.dept_code = d.dept_code WHERE e.emp_no = #{drafterEmpNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT order_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO orders ( order_code, cust_code, order_drafting_date, order_confirmed_date, approval_timestamp, order_sum_price, drafter_empno, appr_empno, eapp_status, reg_emp_no, purchase_reg_date ) VALUES ( #{order_code}, #{cust_code}, SYSDATE, #{order_confirmed_date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approval_timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{order_sum_price}, #{drafter_empno}, #{appr_empno}, #{eapp_status}, #{reg_emp_no}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO orders_detail ( order_code, product_code, orders_drafter_empno, order_amount, order_unit_price, order_amt_price, reg_emp_no, purchase_reg_date ) VALUES ( #{order_code}, #{product_code}, #{orders_drafter_empno}, #{order_amount}, #{order_unit_price}, #{order_amt_price}, #{reg_emp_no}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET eapp_status = #{shipWait} WHERE eapp_status IN (#{manual}, #{auto}) AND order_confirmed_date <= SYSDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_execution_log (batch_name, exec_date, exec_time, affected_rows, scheduled_time) VALUES (#{batchName}, #{execDate}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{affectedRows}, #{scheduledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
